zh.lifeSummary: 當Elizabeth Radcliffe於1490年出生在英國諾福爾可吉波利時，她的父親Sir Robert Radcliffe41歲，母親Catherine Drury41歲。她和Roger Woodhouse至少有6個兒子和9個女兒。她去世於大約1565年享年76歲，埋葬在英國諾福爾可瓦可哈姆。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Elizabeth Radcliffe于1490年出生在英国諾福爾可吉波利时，她的父亲Sir Robert Radcliffe41岁，母亲Catherine Drury41岁。她和Roger Woodhouse至少有6个儿子和9个女儿。她去世于大约1565年享年76岁，埋葬在英国諾福爾可瓦可哈姆。

nameMeanings.name: Radcliffe
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.

variants.name: Ratliff
meanings: English (Suffolk): habitational name from one or more of the places so named, such as Radcliffe (Lancashire), Radcliffe on Trent and Ratcliffe on Soar (both Nottinghamshire), Radclive (Buckinghamshire), Ratcliffe Culey and Ratcliffe on the Wreake (both Leicestershire), Ratclyffe in Clyst Hydon, Ratcliffes in Thorverton, and Ratcliffes in Broad Clyst (all Devon), Ratcliff in Stepney (Middlesex), and Rackley in Compton Bishop (Somerset). The placenames derive from Old English rēad ‘red’ + clif ‘cliff, bank, steep slope’ (see also Rutley ). A family of the name Radcliffe trace their descent from Sir Nicholas de Radclyffe. He is said to have been a knight who held the major of Radcliffe in Lancashire and served Roger de Poitou, Baron de Marsey in the 11th century.

nameMeanings.name: Elizabeth
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: The usual spelling of   Elisabeth   in English. It is recorded in the medieval period, but was made popular by being borne by  Queen Elizabeth I  of England (  1533–1603 ). In the 20th century it again became extremely fashionable, partly because it was the name of  Elizabeth Bowes-Lyon  (  1900–2002 ), who in  1936  became Queen Elizabeth as the wife of King George VI, and after his death in  1952  achieved great public affection as Queen Mother for nearly half a century. Even more influentially, it is the name of her daughter  Queen Elizabeth II  (  b. 1926 ).

variants.name: Elisabeth
meanings: The spelling of Elizabeth used in the Authorized Version of the New Testament, and in most modern European languages. This was the name of the mother of John the Baptist (Luke 1:60). Etymologically, the name means ‘God is my oath’, and is therefore identical with Elisheba, the name of the wife of Aaron according to the genealogy at Exodus 6:23. The final element seems to have been altered by association with Hebrew shabbāth ‘Sabbath’.

historicEvents.title: Book of Common Prayer
historicEvents.description: Book of Common Prayer, a product of the English Reformation, was published in 1549 for assistance in the administration of the sacraments and other rites and ceremonies of the church according to the use of the Church of England. The book outlined morning, evening, and communion prayers and orders for baptism and marriage, thus making England a truly Protestant state.

historicEvents.title: Act of Uniformity
historicEvents.description: The Act of Uniformity was passed by the Parliament of England and required all people to go to church once a week. The consequence of not attending church was a fine of 12 pence, which was a considerable amount for a poor person.

en.lifeSummary: When Elizabeth Radcliffe was born in 1490, in Kimberley, Norfolk, England, her father, Sir Robert Radcliffe, was 41 and her mother, Catherine Drury, was 41. She had at least 6 sons and 9 daughters with Roger Woodhouse. She died about 1565, at the age of 76, and was buried in Waxham, Norfolk, England.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Elizabeth Radcliffe est née en 1490, à Kimberley, Norfolk, Angleterre, son père, Sir Robert Radcliffe, avait 41 ans et sa mère, Catherine Drury, avait 41 ans. Elle a eu au moins 6 fils et 9 filles avec Roger Woodhouse. Elle est décédée environ 1565, à l’âge de 76 ans, et a été enterrée à Waxham, Norfolk, Angleterre.

de.lifeSummary: Als Elizabeth Radcliffe 1490 in Kimberley, Norfolk, England geboren wurde, war ihr Vater Sir Robert Radcliffe 41 und ihre Mutter Catherine Drury 41. Sie hatte mit Roger Woodhouse mindestens 6 Söhne und 9 Töchter. Sie starb um 1565 im Alter von 76 Jahren und wurde in Waxham, Norfolk, England begraben.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Elizabeth Radcliffe è nata il nel 1490 nel Kimberley, Norfolk, England, sua padre, Sir Robert Radcliffe, aveva 41 anni e sua madre, Catherine Drury, aveva 41 anni. Lei avuto almeno 6 figli e 9 figlie con Roger Woodhouse. Morì circa 1565, all'età di 76 anni, e fu sepolta a Waxham, Norfolk, England.

ja.lifeSummary: Elizabeth Radcliffeが1490年にイギリスノーフォルクキンバーリーで生まれた時，父Sir Robert Radcliffeは41歳，母Catherine Druryは41歳であった。彼女はRoger Woodhouseとの間に少なくとも6人の息子と9人の娘をもうけた。彼女は約1565年に76歳で死去し，イギリスノーフォルクワクスハムにて埋葬された。

ko.lifeSummary: Elizabeth Radcliffe(이)가 1490년 영국 노르폴크 킴벌리에서 태어났을 때, 그녀의 아버지 Sir Robert Radcliffe(은)는 41세였고, 그녀의 어머니 Catherine Drury(은)는 41세였다. 그녀는 Roger Woodhouse(와)과 적어도 여섯 명의 아들과 아홉 명의 딸을 두었다. 그녀는 대략 1565년 76세의 나이로 사망했으며 영국 노르폴크 와스함에 묻혔다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Elizabeth Radcliffe nasceu em 1490, em Kimberley, Norfolk, Inglaterra, seu pai, Sir Robert Radcliffe, tinha 41 anos e sua mãe, Catherine Drury, tinha 41 anos. Ela teve pelo menos 6 filhos e 9 filhas com Roger Woodhouse. Ela faleceu aproximadamente 1565, com 76 anos, e foi sepultada em Waxham, Norfolk, Inglaterra.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Elizabeth Radcliffe родилась в 1490 г. в местности кимбирли, норфолк, Англия, её отцу по имени Sir Robert Radcliffe было 41 год, а матери, которую звали Catherine Drury, 41. У неё было по крайней мере 6 сыновей и 9 дочерей от Roger Woodhouse. Она умерла около 1565 г. в возрасте 76 лет и была похоронена в местности ваксхам, норфолк, Англия.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Elizabeth Radcliffe nació en 1490, en Kimberley, Norfolk, Inglaterra, su papá, Sir Robert Radcliffe, tenía 41 años y su mamá, Catherine Drury, tenía 41 años. Tuvo por lo menos 6 hijos y 9 hijas con Roger Woodhouse. Murió aproximadamente 1565, a la edad de 76 años, y fue sepultada en Waxham, Norfolk, Inglaterra.
